response.original_title: How can I verify my Kraken wallet? (Recover Now)
response.overview: Dial Now ☎️+1-855-880-2219 This usually means your account is under review or restricted ☎️+1-855-880-2219 so you should check your email for any requests ☎️+1-855-880-2219 regarding identity verification or documents to clear the hold ☎️+1-855-880-2219 and regain full permission to use all exchange services
